meta.strategy: Buy a curated 'forever' subset of the watchlist (durable leaders + core ETFs), equal weight, and just hold — no signals, no timing. Shown four ways: $5,000 lump sum and $250/mo dollar-cost averaging, each with and without a yearly rebalance, vs the same money in the S&P 500. A third DCA line tilts each month's cash toward the names the calibrated Buy-now confidence rated best that day (same dollars, smarter split).
meta.note: Common start = when the newest holding (XOM) began trading. The basket holds VOO, so it overlaps the benchmark by design. Rebalancing is modeled cost- and tax-free.

params.live_note: live leg = calibrated 1mo/1yr band up-odds when available
